title: Savory Velvety Portuguese Date Tahini Paste Pudding
description: A low-calorie-friendly savory dessert perfect for date night, featuring tahini paste and dates in a silky texture that's both comforting and indulgent.

ingredients.name: almond milk or any plant-based milk

instructions: Soften the dates in hot water for about 5 minutes.
Pulse the soft dates with tahini paste and vanilla extract until smooth in a blender.
In another bowl, mix the softened butter with flaxseed meal to create an egg replacer. Stir into the date-tahini mixture.
Pour the mixture into a small saucepan and add almond milk. Heat over medium heat, stirring occasionally until thickened to pudding consistency (about 5 minutes).
Serve warm or refrigerate for later. Enjoy as a snack or dessert.
